records.revalidation_trigger: Revalidate when the local government publishes the next dated regional horse-racing notice.
limitations: The reviewed government notice covers one regional event and must not be generalised to all Mongolian racing.
The confirmed May 19, 2026 event has passed; future rows require a new notice.
Race times, participants, results, and prize information remain excluded.
records.notes: The government notice supports manual C-level date-and-venue confirmation for the bounded regional event.
